steps.title: Write the ticket equation
steps.content:
The aquarium sold $300$ total tickets. With $s$ standard tickets and $p$ premium tickets, the count equation is
$$s+p=300$$

steps.title: Write the revenue equation
steps.content:
Standard tickets cost $6$ dollars each, and premium tickets cost $14$ dollars each. The revenue equation is
$$6s+14p=3{,}120$$
